business_ideas.idea: Physical quarterly magazines for niche industries with professional name rankings and FOMO
Media company focused on alternative investments (real estate, PE, VC) education
Retail investor education platform (like Motley Fool) + media funnel + premium subscription
Alternative news/journalism disruption (like Bari Weiss Free Press model)
Sports leagues using content as moat (like Overtime competing with NCAA/NBA)
Niche physical magazines (quarterly manila envelopes, $500/year premium journalism)

predictions.text: All media channels (podcasts, YouTube, newsletters) now saturated; game is harder
Alternative investments becoming bigger portfolio % but complex - media opportunity
Retail investor education still $100M+ opportunity (Altucher makes $120M/year)
Niche-focused content (not general audience) is path to success in saturated market
Physical/print media resurging for luxury and niche audiences (Arena Mag proof)
